learn.core_idea: Concurrent asynchronous completions interleave; deterministic ordering still enables reproducible diagnosis.
mechanism_steps: Observe completion events entering event queue.
Check stable order in deterministic replay.
Use order evidence to reason about outcomes.
learn.worked_example: Read and write completions may interleave predictably by simulated timing and sequence.
common_mistakes: Expecting arbitrary order under deterministic engine.
pre_challenge_checklist: I can trace event order across IRQ completions.
I can explain why order is stable here.
